---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for read-pal
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? (e.g. "I can't export my highlights as PDF")

## Proposed Solution
Describe your ideal solution.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or examples from other apps.
